output.title: Landlord Withholding Your Security Deposit? A 3-Email Recovery Sequence to Get Your Money Back Fast
output.meta_description: Is your landlord withholding your security deposit? Learn your tenant rights, what landlords can deduct, and how to demand your money back today.
content_outline: Email 1 – The Urgency Trigger: Subject line targeting 'landlord not returning deposit' and 'security deposit not returned'; body opens with the frustration hook, highlights state-specific legal deadlines (14–30 days), and warns of automatic penalties for non-compliance.

Email 2 – The Rights Audit: Subject line targeting 'can landlord keep security deposit' and 'what can landlord deduct from security deposit'; body breaks down illegal deductions vs. normal wear and tear, covers 'tenant rights security deposit' by state, and debunks common landlord excuses.

Email 3 – The Demand & Action: Subject line targeting 'security deposit dispute letter' and 'what to do when landlord doesn't return deposit'; body introduces DepositBack’s automated demand letter tool, outlines the small-claims pathway, and drives immediate recovery action.
key_points: Problem-aware tenants respond to deadline-driven urgency; most states impose strict timelines and statutory penalties for withheld deposits.
Landlords must provide itemized deductions and cannot charge for normal wear and tear; many withhold deposits illegally hoping tenants give up.
A formal demand letter is the legally required precursor to small-claims court in most jurisdictions and drastically improves recovery odds.
DepositBack automates state-specific security deposit demand letters, turning tenant frustration into enforceable, attorney-level action in minutes.
output.cta: Stop waiting. Generate your state-specific security deposit demand letter with DepositBack in under 5 minutes and force your landlord to pay what they owe.
output.target_audience: Frustrated US renters whose landlords are withholding, wrongfully deducting, or refusing to return a security deposit after move-out.
